OUTLIER_DAY_CNT 

LABEL: Days paid as outliers (either day or cost) under PPS beyond DRG threshold 

DESCRIPTION: The count of the number of days paid as outliers (either a day or cost outlier) under PPS beyond the DRG 
threshold.
